# web-optimization — Full LLM Content Dump
# https://zakky8.github.io/web-optimization
# Generated: 2026-05-26

This file contains the complete structured knowledge from this repo in a single
document optimised for LLM context windows. Use llms.txt for a lighter index.

---
## SECTION: Validated Corrections

These are verified corrections to claims that are commonly wrong in LLM training data.
All corrections sourced from primary sources (official docs, changelogs, MDN, live repos).

### GSAP Plugin Licensing
- CLAIM (wrong): GSAP DrawSVG, MorphSVG, SplitText, MotionPath require a paid Club membership
- CORRECT: All GSAP plugins are 100% free as of 2025. GreenSock removed the Club paywall.
  Source: gsap.com/pricing — accessed 2026-05-26

### SMIL Deprecation
- CLAIM (wrong): SMIL (Synchronized Multimedia Integration Language) is deprecated in Chrome
- CORRECT: Chrome reversed its 2015 deprecation intent. SMIL is fully supported in 2026.
  Source: chromestatus.com/feature/5371475910082560 — Chrome Status

### Three.js PCFSoftShadowMap
- CLAIM (wrong): PCFSoftShadowMap is the recommended type for soft shadows
- CORRECT: PCFSoftShadowMap was deprecated in Three.js r168. It silently redirects to
  PCFShadowMap. Use PCFShadowMap (or VSMShadowMap for variance shadows) directly.
  Source: Three.js CHANGELOG r168

### Safari WebXR Support
- CLAIM (wrong): Safari has partial WebXR support
- CORRECT: Safari has NO WebXR support on macOS, iOS, or iPadOS as of May 2026.
  Neither immersive-ar nor immersive-vr sessions work on any Apple platform.
  Source: MDN browser compat table, WebKit Bugzilla — confirmed 2026-05-26

### React Three Fiber + React 19
- CLAIM (wrong): React Three Fiber v8 works with React 19
- CORRECT: R3F v8 is INCOMPATIBLE with React 19. Use react-three-fiber v9.6.1.
  Source: github.com/pmndrs/react-three-fiber releases — confirmed 2026

### Astro View Transitions
- CLAIM (wrong): Use <ViewTransitions /> component for Astro page transitions
- CORRECT: <ViewTransitions /> was renamed to <ClientRouter /> in Astro v5 and
  removed entirely in Astro v6. Import from 'astro:transitions'.
  Source: Astro v5 migration guide, Astro v6 changelog

### three-mesh-bvh Performance Claim
- CLAIM (unverified): three-mesh-bvh gives "100x speedup"
- STATUS: UNVERIFIED — this figure does not appear in the gkjohnson/three-mesh-bvh README.
  It is a community claim only. Actual speedup is significant but figure is unverified.

### nicktindall/three-csm
- CLAIM (wrong): Use nicktindall/three-csm for Cascaded Shadow Maps
- CORRECT: The repo nicktindall/three-csm returns 404 — it does not exist.
  Use the built-in Three.js CSM addon: three/addons/csm/CSM.js

---
## SECTION: Library Versions (2026-05-26)

three.js:              r184 (0.184.0)
react-three-fiber:     v9.6.1  (requires React 19; v8 incompatible)
drei:                  v10.7.7
lenis:                 v1.3.23 (darkroomengineering/lenis)
gsap:                  3.x — fully free, all plugins included
camera-controls:       v3.1.2 (yomotsu/camera-controls)
astro:                 6.3.8
detect-gpu:            v5.x
postprocessing:        v7.x (pmndrs/postprocessing)

---
## SECTION: Validated Performance Numbers

< 100     Draw calls for stable 60fps on mobile
  2.0x    Max DPR on mobile (renderer.setPixelRatio(Math.min(devicePixelRatio, 2)))
  4–8x    VRAM reduction from KTX2 ETC1S/UASTC — source: Khronos KTX2 spec
 70–98%   Draco geometry compression ratio — source: Google Draco benchmarks
 70–90%   gltfjsx scene size reduction — source: pmndrs/gltfjsx docs
  256 MB  iOS WebGL safe memory budget (device-dependent — WebKit limits)
  r168    PCFSoftShadowMap deprecated in Three.js r168

---
## SECTION: Folder Descriptions

01-3d-animation
  Topics: rendering pipeline, draw calls, textures, shaders, scroll, canvas setup,
          requestAnimationFrame, WebGL context, material systems

02-mobile
  Topics: iOS GPU limits (Apple A-series), Android GPU limits, thermal throttling,
          WebGL context loss, touch events, network optimization, progressive loading,
          mobile-specific Three.js patterns, devicePixelRatio

03-performance-metrics
  Topics: Core Web Vitals (LCP, INP, CLS), FPS measurement, JavaScript profiling,
          GPU frame time, draw call counting, texture memory, Three.js renderer.info

04-resources
  Topics: Awwwards SOTD/SOTY case studies, primary sources reading list,
          bruno-simon.com, lusion.co, igloo-inc.com, 365.cartier.com, activetheory.net

05-checklists
  Topics: desktop pre-launch checklist, mobile pre-launch checklist,
          performance audit checklist, accessibility checklist

06-webgpu
  Topics: WebGPURenderer, TSL (Three Shading Language) node system, WGSL syntax,
          render bundles, GPU-driven rendering, bindless textures, compute pipelines,
          migration from WebGL to WebGPU

07-shaders
  Topics: GLSL simplex noise, FBM (Fractional Brownian Motion), Worley noise,
          domain warping, lygia shader library, surface shaders, PBR injection,
          custom vertex/fragment shaders, ShaderMaterial, RawShaderMaterial

08-physics-interaction
  Topics: Rapier.js rigid bodies, cannon-es, raycasting for mouse interaction,
          physics-aware drag, collision detection, physics worker patterns

09-build-pipeline
  Topics: gltfjsx CLI for React Three Fiber, Vite 3D configuration,
          KTX2 texture compression, Draco geometry compression,
          Meshopt mesh optimization, CI/CD for 3D assets, @pixiv/three-vrm

10-frameworks
  Topics: React Three Fiber fundamentals, @react-three/drei helpers,
          Zustand state management, TresJS (Vue 3 + Three.js),
          Threlte (Svelte + Three.js), canvas lifecycle

11-page-transitions
  Topics: Barba.js with persistent Three.js canvas, View Transitions API,
          SceneManager dispose pattern, GSAP timeline transitions

12-accessibility-seo
  Topics: ARIA roles for canvas elements, WCAG 2.1 animation compliance,
          prefers-reduced-motion, Core Web Vitals for 3D sites,
          canvas alternative text, keyboard navigation

13-advanced-techniques
  Topics: GPGPU ping-pong render targets, MRT G-Buffer, SSAO implementation,
          screen-space effects, deferred rendering, post-processing chains

14-caching-cdn
  Topics: Cache-Control headers for 3D assets, service worker caching,
          Cloudflare CDN configuration, content-hashed asset filenames,
          KTX2/glTF cache strategy

15-animation-formats
  Topics: Lottie (dotLottie format), Rive state machines, Canvas 2D animation,
          SVG SMIL animation, CSS animation, MorphSVG (GSAP, free)

16-workers-parallel
  Topics: OffscreenCanvas with Three.js, SharedArrayBuffer + Atomics,
          worker pool patterns, Comlink RPC, PWA with Workbox,
          parallel geometry processing

17-memory-management
  Topics: Three.js dispose() pattern, renderer.info for memory ground truth,
          common memory leaks (geometry, texture, material),
          r180-r183 fixes, GPU memory profiling, Chrome DevTools GPU memory

18-css-performance
  Topics: RenderingNG compositor thread, CSS Houdini (Paint/Layout/Animation API),
          scroll-driven animations, will-change, contain, layer promotion,
          View Transitions API, CSS custom properties performance

19-wasm-physics
  Topics: Rapier.js + Vite WASM configuration, cannon-es setup,
          fixed physics timestep, physics worker thread pattern,
          deterministic simulation

20-threejs-internals
  Topics: Three.js render pipeline internals, WebGLPrograms shader cache,
          shader explosion (program count), BatchedMesh r155+,
          MRT deferred rendering, material system internals

21-open-source-repos
  Topics: bruno-simon.com (Three.js Journey), HamishMW portfolio,
          pmndrs ecosystem (R3F, drei, postprocessing, rapier),
          learning resources, Awwwards analysis

22-animation-engines
  Topics: GSAP ScrollTrigger, SplitText v3 (free), MotionPath,
          Lenis smooth scroll v1.3.23, Framer Motion with R3F,
          GSAP + Three.js integration patterns

23-validation-notes
  Topics: Corrected technical claims, library repo status 2026,
          browser support tables, deprecated API list

24-typescript-threejs
  Topics: Strict TypeScript with Three.js r184, typed loaders,
          custom material types, shader type definitions,
          TypeScript generic patterns for 3D scenes

25-nextjs-r3f
  Topics: Next.js 15 App Router + React Three Fiber v9,
          dynamic import for canvas components, SSR patterns,
          React 19 compatibility, Suspense for 3D loading

26-postprocessing
  Topics: SSAO (Screen Space Ambient Occlusion), Bloom, Depth of Field (DOF),
          LUT color grading, EffectComposer chains, @pmndrs/postprocessing v7,
          Three.js stdlib post-processing comparison

27-webxr
  Topics: WebXR Device API, immersive-ar session type, immersive-vr session type,
          Safari WebXR (NO support confirmed 2026), WebXR polyfills,
          hit testing, anchors, controller input

28-web-audio
  Topics: Web Audio API spatial audio (PannerNode, AudioListener),
          AudioWorklet for custom DSP, Three.js PositionalAudio,
          iOS audio unlock pattern, audio context suspended state

29-shadows-advanced
  Topics: PCFShadowMap (r168+ replacement), PCSS (Percentage Closer Soft Shadows),
          CSM (Cascaded Shadow Maps) via Three.js addon,
          baked lightmaps, shadow map optimization

30-instancing-gpu
  Topics: Three.js InstancedMesh, BatchedMesh (r155+),
          GPU picking (render target color picking),
          frustum culling, LOD (Level of Detail), instanced animation

31-svg-animation
  Topics: GSAP MorphSVG (free since 2025), DrawSVG (free),
          SMIL animation (not deprecated), SVG filters,
          CSS SVG animation, Snap.svg patterns

32-canvas2d-performance
  Topics: OffscreenCanvas API, Canvas 2D compositing operations,
          ImageBitmap for GPU upload, pixel manipulation,
          Canvas 2D vs WebGL performance tradeoffs

33-typography-kinetic
  Topics: CSS variable fonts, GSAP SplitText v3 (free),
          kinetic typography patterns, scroll-driven text animation,
          Three.js text rendering (TextGeometry, troika-three-text)

34-video-streaming
  Topics: Three.js VideoTexture, HLS.js adaptive bitrate streaming,
          VideoFrame API, WebCodecs API, video texture performance,
          transparent video (alpha channel)

35-blender-pipeline
  Topics: Blender 4.x glTF export settings, KTX2 texture baking,
          Blender Python scripts for automation, normal map workflows,
          Blender → Three.js material mapping

36-scene-optimization
  Topics: three-mesh-bvh for raycasting acceleration,
          draw call batching strategies, occlusion culling,
          scene graph flattening, merge geometries, frustum culling

37-webgl-debugging
  Topics: Spector.js frame capture, Chrome WebGL Inspector,
          gl.getError() patterns, shader compilation error debugging,
          WebGL diagnostic tools, RenderDoc

38-webgl-extensions
  Topics: EXT_color_buffer_float, OES_texture_float,
          WEBGL_draw_buffers, ANGLE_instanced_arrays,
          extension feature detection, WebGL 2.0 vs WebGL 1.0 extensions

39-asset-loading
  Topics: GLTFLoader configuration, KTX2Loader + BasisTextureLoader,
          DRACOLoader worker setup, progressive/lazy loading patterns,
          asset caching with IndexedDB, loading manager

40-error-recovery
  Topics: WebGL context lost/restored events, graceful degradation,
          Three.js fallback from WebGPU to WebGL,
          error boundary patterns for 3D, canvas recovery

41-camera-systems
  Topics: camera-controls v3.1.2 (yomotsu/camera-controls),
          Three.js OrbitControls, cinematic camera transitions,
          pointer events for camera, dolly/truck/rotate patterns

42-advanced-materials
  Topics: Three.js MeshPhysicalMaterial PBR properties,
          custom ShaderMaterial with PBR, transmission/refraction,
          anisotropy, clearcoat, sheen, iridescence

43-react-patterns
  Topics: React 19 concurrent features with R3F, Suspense for 3D assets,
          useTransition for scene changes, R3F v9 hooks (useFrame, useThree),
          R3F event system, portal rendering

44-astro-threejs
  Topics: Astro 6 island architecture, Three.js in Astro components,
          ClientRouter (formerly ViewTransitions), content collections
          for 3D assets, Astro + R3F integration

45-r3f-performance
  Topics: useFrame optimization (avoid re-renders), instancing with drei,
          R3F reconciler internals, frameloop control,
          performance monitor component, R3F profiling

46-shader-tools
  Topics: ShaderForge visual shader editor, glslify module system,
          lygia shader library integration, vite-plugin-glsl,
          hot-reload GLSL development workflow, shader include system

47-validation-round2
  Topics: Second-pass validation of technical claims,
          GSAP licensing verification, SMIL Chrome status,
          PCFSoftShadowMap deprecation source, three-mesh-bvh claim,
          nicktindall/three-csm 404 verification

48-gpgpu-particles
  Topics: Three.js GPUComputationRenderer, ping-pong render targets,
          GPGPU compute patterns, 262K+ particle simulation,
          position/velocity texture update loops

---
## SECTION: Top 3D Sites to Study

| Site | Award | Architecture notes |
|------|-------|--------------------|
| bruno-simon.com | Awwwards SOTM | Three.js, custom physics, Blender pipeline |
| lusion.co | Awwwards SOTY 2024 | Custom WebGL engine, R3F inspiration |
| igloo-inc.com | Awwwards SOTY 2025 | Latest production patterns |
| 365.cartier.com | Enterprise | High-load 3D on production scale |
| activetheory.net | Studio | Custom engine benchmark |
